title: Posters to encourage census completion
content:
## Posters to encourage census completion
Print and post these in high-traffic community spots to encourage census completion.
- Poster — It's not too late to complete your 2026 Census!
- Poster — It's not too late to complete your 2026 Census! (bilingual)
- Poster — 2026 Census collection is underway across Canada
- Postcard — The 2026 Census is underway

## Poster — It's not too late to complete your 2026 Census!
Census data are essential for planning programs and services that support employment, transit, education, health care and more.
Don't forget to complete your census questionnaire online today: census.gc.ca

## Poster — It's not too late to complete your 2026 Census! (bilingual)
Census data are essential for planning programs and services that support employment, transit, education, health care and more.
Don't forget to complete your census questionnaire online today: census.gc.ca

### Il n'est pas trop tard pour remplir votre questionnaire du Recensement de 2026!
Les données du recensement sont essentielles à la planification des programmes et services qui soutiennent l’emploi, le transport, l’éducation, les soins de santé et plus.
N'oubliez pas de remplir votre questionnaire en ligne dès aujourd’hui : recensement.gc.ca

## Poster — 2026 Census collection is underway across Canada

### It's not too late – there's still time to complete your census questionnaire!
- Census data are essential for planning programs and services that support employment, transit, education, health care and more.
- Census invitation letters have been delivered to households with instructions on how to complete their questionnaire.
- The census questions are available in alternate formats and 28 non-official languages for reference purposes.
- All information is collected under the authority of the Statistics Act and will be kept strictly confidential.
Census employees will be visiting households across the country to follow up and offer assistance with completing questionnaires. Census employees will clearly identify themselves and have an identification card.
Don't forget to complete your census questionnaire online today: census.gc.ca
If you require additional assistance, please contact the Census Help Line. Toll-free number: 1-833-852-2026 Teletypewriter (TTY): 1-833-830-3109

## Postcard — The 2026 Census is underway
Your Census. Your Community. Our Future.

### Your participation matters.
Check your mail for your census invitation letter and follow the instructions to complete your questionnaire online.

### What you need to know
- Your census is easy to fill out and completely confidential.
- The information you provide helps plan programs and services in your community that support employment, transit, education, health care and more.
- The census questions are available in alternate formats and 28 languages for reference purposes.
For more information and to complete your census online, visit census.gc.ca
If you require additional assistance, please contact the Census Help Line. Toll-free number: 1-833-852-2026 Teletypewriter (TTY): 1-833-830-3109
